dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3799 RS: Healthy Start Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Marshall (for himself, Mrs. Gillibrand, Ms. Baldwin, and Ms. Hassan) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
Reported by Mr. Cassidy, with an amendment
action.action-instruction: Omit the part struck through and insert the part printed in italic

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the Healthy Start Initiative.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Healthy Start Reauthorization Act of 2026.

Section 330H(e)(1) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 254c–8(e)(1)) is amended by striking appropriated and all that follows through the period at the end and inserting appropriated $145,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030$145,250,000 for each of fiscal years 2027 through 2031..
